title: netbox-federation plugin
description: Native NetBox SoT for cross-service/cross-org federation: FederationRealm (a local service that federates) + FederationPeer (a remote trusted party), uniform across Matrix S2S, Nextcloud federated sharing, SAML/OIDC, ActivityPub, and XMPP S2S. Composes netbox-services (FKs ServiceInstance). Signing keys and peering shared secrets are OpenBao path refs, never values. Baseline scaffold + full spec is committed and py_compile-clean; the items below are the deep work owed against a live NetBox.

phases.title: Live-NetBox verification
phases.exit_criteria: makemigrations --check --dry-run reports no changes and the full test suite is green on the pinned NetBox 4.6.

items.description: Run `python manage.py makemigrations netbox_federation --check --dry-run` on an ephemeral NetBox 4.6; confirm the hand-authored 0001_initial matches the models (FederationRealm.service_instance FK target netbox_services.serviceinstance serializes, the (realm, peer_domain) unique constraint resolves, dependencies dcim/extras/netbox_services resolve).

`python /opt/netbox/app/netbox/manage.py test netbox_federation --keepdb -v2` green: models (str/colors, (realm, peer_domain) uniqueness, cascade, secret-ref-is-a-path), api (CRUD mixins for realm + peer), filtersets (protocol/direction/trust_level choice filters, realm FK-id scope, search()).

Confirm `netbox_services.api.serializers.ServiceInstanceSerializer` import path resolves at runtime under the deployed netbox-services wheel; adjust the nested serializer import if the sibling renames it.

phases.title: Deploy + backfill
phases.exit_criteria: Plugin is installed as a wheel on prod + dev NetBox, migrated, granted, and the existing federated services are represented natively.

items.description: Build + `uv pip install --no-deps --reinstall` the wheel into the NetBox venv (prod pct 74234, dev pct 92254), migrate netbox_federation, restart once, and scope an ObjectPermission grant so the new models are not 403 (the netbox-system-services deploy pattern).

Populate FederationRealm + FederationPeer from the real federated deployments (Matrix homeserver + its federation allow/deny peers, Nextcloud trusted servers, Authentik SAML/OIDC federations) and link each realm to its netbox_services.ServiceInstance where one exists; signing_key_ref/shared_secret_ref point at OpenBao paths.

phases.title: Seeder + consumer wiring
phases.exit_criteria: An idempotent seeder loads federation intent into NetBox and the tofu providers read it as SoT.

items.description: Idempotent upsert seeder (the netbox-seeder pattern) for FederationRealm/FederationPeer, with signing_key_ref/shared_secret_ref pointing at OpenBao paths (never secret values).

Wire tofu-matrix / tofu-nextcloud / tofu-authentik to read the REST contract for realms + peers and realize each side of the federation (Matrix .well-known + allow/deny list; Nextcloud trusted servers / OCM; Authentik SAML/OIDC entity + metadata), with signing keys / shared secrets resolved from the *_ref OpenBao paths at apply time.
